sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ لَيْلَى عَمَلَهَا فِي الْمَكْتَبِ عِنْدَ السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla počinje svoj posao u kancelariji u osam sati.
sentences.translationEn: Layla starts her work in the office at eight o'clock.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ بِمُرَاجَعَةِ رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ وَتَنْظِيمِ جَدْوَلِهَا.
sentences.translation: Pregleda e-mailove i organizuje svoj raspored.
sentences.translationEn: She reviews her emails and organizes her schedule.

sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ لَيْلَى التَّعَاوُنَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا لِإِنْجَازِ الْمَشَارِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla voli sarađivati sa svojim kolegama kako bi završila projekte.
sentences.translationEn: Layla likes cooperating with her colleagues to complete projects.
